config.title: Party Tracker Configuration
config.iconsNote: Customize the icons used for party status display.
config.resetContent: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to their default values?
config.resetSuccess: Settings have been reset to defaults.

modifierPicker.title: Edit Status Modifier
modifierPicker.tintHint: Color overlay applied to the base icon
modifierPicker.badgeHint: Small icon overlay indicating the status

partyTrackerEnabled.name: Enable Party Tracker
partyTrackerEnabled.hint: Show the party status tracker on trainer tokens

partyTrackerPosition.name: Party Tracker Position
partyTrackerPosition.hint: Where to display the party tracker relative to the token

partyTrackerOffsetX.name: Party Tracker X Offset
partyTrackerOffsetX.hint: Horizontal offset from the anchor position (pixels)

partyTrackerOffsetY.name: Party Tracker Y Offset
partyTrackerOffsetY.hint: Vertical offset from the anchor position (pixels)

partyTrackerIconSize.name: Party Tracker Icon Size
partyTrackerIconSize.hint: Size of each party status icon (pixels)

partyTrackerDirection.name: Party Tracker Direction
partyTrackerDirection.hint: Layout direction for party status icons

partyTrackerVisibility.name: Party Tracker Visibility
partyTrackerVisibility.hint: When the party tracker should be visible

partyTrackerUseSprites.name: Use Pokemon Sprites
partyTrackerUseSprites.hint: Display Pokemon sprites instead of pokeball icons

equipmentTrackerEnabled.name: Enable Equipment Tracker
equipmentTrackerEnabled.hint: Show the equipment/belt item tracker on trainer tokens

equipmentTrackerPosition.name: Equipment Tracker Position
equipmentTrackerPosition.hint: Where to display the equipment tracker relative to the token

equipmentTrackerOffsetX.name: Equipment Tracker X Offset
equipmentTrackerOffsetX.hint: Horizontal offset from the anchor position (pixels)

equipmentTrackerOffsetY.name: Equipment Tracker Y Offset
equipmentTrackerOffsetY.hint: Vertical offset from the anchor position (pixels)

equipmentTrackerVisibility.name: Equipment Tracker Visibility
equipmentTrackerVisibility.hint: When the equipment tracker should be visible

equipmentTrackerShowBeltFirst.name: Show Belt Items First
equipmentTrackerShowBeltFirst.hint: Display belt items before other equipped items

equipmentTrackerMaxItems.name: Max Equipment Items
equipmentTrackerMaxItems.hint: Maximum number of equipment items to display

equipmentTrackerShowBelt.name: Show Belt Items
equipmentTrackerShowBelt.hint: Display items in the belt slot

partyCap.name: Party Cap
partyCap.hint: Maximum number of Pokemon slots to display

defaultsHumanoid.name: Humanoid Defaults
defaultsHumanoid.hint: Default tracker settings for humanoid actors

defaultsPokemon.name: Pokemon Defaults
defaultsPokemon.hint: Default tracker settings for pokemon actors

tokenConfig.description: Configure how the party and equipment trackers appear on this token.
